Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lucan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Lucan is on the other side of the wall from Jerri's cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Lucan used a Reader ritual to mute sound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Lucan is a prisoner who knows Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Lucan is a Consultant prisoner bending over a bronze blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Lucan is a character held in a cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Lucan is in a cell and feels the life of a dagger taking shape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Lucan has a cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Lucan wears a seamless black outfit and a black cloth half-mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Lucan is a Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Lucan was held in a cell that was covered in rocks and dust.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan was someone who believed in giving targets a chance at redemption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan is a person Shera thinks of to avoid killing the Mason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan is never allowed off the Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Lucan is an inmate in the subterranean prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Lucan is a half-blooded Heartlander.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Lucan received personal training from the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Lucan is a character who will be placed under provisional house arrest in the Gray District.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Lucan is someone Shera wants to set free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Lucan is a student who asks too many questions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Lucan's freedom was present on the deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Lucan is a character who spoke to Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Lucan was arrested for revealing Guild secrets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Shera spoke to Lucan at length about her injuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Lucan believes there is a time for sparing enemies and a time not to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Lucan would have been grieved by the loss of life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Lucan is a person who can feel the weight of Intent in a blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Lucan was imprisoned for learning secrets of the original Am'haranai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Lucan believes one person is not worth more than another.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan was writing in his cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan was part of the team that completed their first official Guild mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Lucan holds a closed chest the size of a jewelry box from which Nakothi's Heart spews whispers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Lucan views Shera as a sister, a friend, and potentially something else.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Lucan is investing everything he can into Shera's shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Lucan uses invested gloves to control his Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Lucan is a passenger on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan has an Awakening Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan has been in captivity for almost two years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan wears gloves to avoid Reading the Intent of Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan has spent two years in a cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — Lucan has the ability to make his gloves and boots stick to walls like a fly's legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Lucan possesses Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Lucan created the weapon Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Lucan hurled a blade with all his strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Lucan is a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Lucan's mask was woven from wool of sleeping sheep and invested with the Intent of peace, calm, and stability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Lucan is limping to shelter with Shera and Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Lucan is a teammate of Shera and Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Lucan uses shears to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Lucan jogged up to Meia and Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Lucan invested and wove bandages around Shera's blade to stop it from whispering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Lucan reported to the High Council of Architects regarding a battle against the Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Lucan is a Blackwatch traitor.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan used Reading to temporarily Awaken stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan is an assassin and a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan is a Consultant and a Reader capable of rocking stone like storm-tossed waves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan was able to pass through ropes binding his arms as though they had rotted off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan has dark skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Lucan provided testimony regarding the Emperor's throne.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Lucan is a person Shera thinks about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Lucan is noted for asking many questions before following orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan is a person who approaches situations with specific plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan was once held in a network of tunnels at the foundation of Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan has worked on his Intent with the quicklamp in his cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan is a Heartlander man who appears healthy and lively.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Lucan is a character who uses tools of Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Lucan can pick up on Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Lucan is part of a squad intended to ultimately kill the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Lucan was silent during the Emperor's speech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Lucan is someone Shera has worked with for years regarding Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Lucan is a Reader and an Architect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Lucan is a friend of the female character (implied to be Shera).}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Lucan wears gloves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Lucan is a Reader and a Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan experiences Reader burn when using his powers too much.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan's Intent can cause the courtyard of the Imperial Palace to ripple upward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan emerged wearing a shroud over his mouth and nose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan stood on one side of Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Lucan was an assassin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Lucan's Intent radiated from his former surroundings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Lucan was to Shera's left during the vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Lucan provides advice to Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Lucan had a cell in a tunnel that collapsed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Lucan was on his knees clutching his head in gloved hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Lucan was paralyzed during the event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan Awakened Shera's other weapon a few weeks prior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Lucan was talking with Calder.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Lucan died.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Lucan is a person who is gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Shera thought about telling Lucan something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Lucan is the leader of the scout team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Lucan uses bronze shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Lucan uses a bronze dagger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Lucan was killed by Calder Marten's wife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Lucan is a member of the Consultant's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Lucan experienced a stinging in his head from stretching himself in Reading powerful Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Lucan is a person who keeps himself in shape with regular training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Lucan is frustrated by the potential for internal fighting among rulers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Lucan has two millennia of experience ruling the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan uses spades as weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan wears a shroud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan can use Reading to find traps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan wears a camouflaged cloak and masterfully crafted blacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan's forearm bone is snapped by a gunshot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan is shot in the side of the skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera seeks revenge for Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan was killed by Jyrine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Lucan's unconscious body drifted into the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Lucan was healed by Loreli.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Lucan mentioned Jyrine's desire to share her point of view.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan is with the leaders of the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan was targeted for execution by Yala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan is referred to as a buck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan is facing shallow imprisonment in cells close to the surface.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Lucan believes Shera should serve to protect people if she can.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Lucan was alive in the past.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Shera's motivation for a secret solo mission was potentially to free Lucan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
